html:
Exclusive to:

“While stocked with twigs and rocks, regular Merm will grab a Shoddy Tool from it, reducing its stores.

Shoddy tools will increase the amount of work a merm does for a short time.

With a shoddy tool, follower Merm will help chop trees, mine rocks, dig in a garden and Till soil.”

-

The Shoddy Tool Shed is a special structure that can only be built by a Wurt with the "Industrious Merm I" skill and can only be placed on Marsh Turf. Common Merms that are close to this structure and do not already have a tool in hand will craft a tool for themselves at the Shoddy Tool and equip it. Each craft of a Shoddy Tool by a Merm will use 1 Twigs and 1 Rocks. Upon being built, the Shoddy Tool Shed will hold 5 Twigs and 5 Rocks. If a Shoddy Tool Shed does not have enough resources, its door will be open.

The Shoddy Tool Shed can be filled with Twigs and Rocks, but only by Wurt or a Character wearing a Clever Disguise.

A Merm with a Shoddy Tool that following the player will help chop trees, mine rocks, dig up tree stumps and till farm soil.

Slightly Less Shoddy Tool Shed

“While stocked with twigs and rocks, regular Merm will grab a Slightly Less Shoddy Tool from it, reducing its stores.

Slightly Less Shoddy tools increase the amount of work a merm does a little more than their lesser sibling, the Shoddy Tool.

With a shoddy tool, follower Merm will help chop trees, mine rocks, dig in a garden and Till soil.”

-

The Slightly Less Shoddy Tool Shed is a special structure that can only be built by Wurt with the "Industrious Merm II" skill and can be only be placed on Marsh Turf. Common Merms that are close to this structure and do not already have a tool in hand will craft themselves a Slightly Less Shoddy Tool and equip it. Each craft of a Slightly Less Shoddy Tool will use 1 Twigs and 1 Rocks. Upon being built, the Slightly Less Shoddy Tool Shed will hold 5 Twigs and 5 Rocks. If a Slightly Less Shoddy Tool Shed does not have enough resources, its door will be open.

Slightly Less Shoddy Tool Sheds can be filled with Twigs and Rocks, but only by Wurt or any Character wearing a Clever Disguise.

A Merm with a Slightly Less Shoddy Tool following a player will help that player chop trees, mine rocks, dig up tree stumps and till farm soil.

Tips

  • You can first build a Shoddy Tool Shed or Slightly Less Shoddy Tool Shed with the necessary skills and then swap characters back to Wurt at the Celestial Portal, with a different skill tree. This will allow you to fill a Shoddy Tool Shed with resources without the "Industrious Merm I" or "Industrious Merm II" skills.

Gallery

  • Shoddy Tool Shed concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

Exclusive to:
Shoddy Tool Shed
Full
Empty
"A merm is only as good as their tools."
Object Info
Can be Burned
Crafting
×2 ×5 ×5 ( only)
Filters
(for ).
Miscellaneous
"merm_toolshed"
“I don't think I'll find anything scientific in there.”
–Wilson
“What a nice, flammable-looking tool shed!”
–Willow
“No Wolfgangs allowed. Aw.”
–Wolfgang
“Father had a tool shed, though he hardly used it.”
–Wendy
“SHODDY CONSTRUCTION”
–WX-78
“A place for everything, and everything in its place.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like where the scaly folks keep their tools.”
–Woodie
“I'm certain there's nothing inside I'd want.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a place för wörkers, nöt warriörs.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, how come we're not allowed inside?”
–Webber
“What have they cooked up in there?”
–Warly
“Glub Glub sticks inside”
–Wormwood
“I know a toolshed when I see one.”
–Winona
“Does appear we're not welcome here.”
–Wortox
“Mermfolk tools inside.”
–Wurt
“I wonder what kind of bog monster secrets they're hiding in there...”
–Walter
“I doubt there's anything in there worth my time.”
–Wanda
“While stocked with twigs and rocks, regular Merm will grab a Shoddy Tool from it, reducing its stores.
Shoddy tools will increase the amount of work a merm does for a short time.
With a shoddy tool, follower Merm will help chop trees, mine rocks, dig in a garden and Till soil.”
